inputs.label: Angle
inputs.businessContext: Enter the angle value. Base unit is degrees unless unit selector is set to 1 (radians).

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the angle value. Base unit is degrees unless unit selector is set to 1 (radians).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Açı değerini girin. Birim seçici 1 (radyan) olarak ayarlanmadıkça temel birim derecedir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Winkelwert ein. Basiseinheit ist Grad, es sei denn, der Einheitenwähler ist auf 1 (Bogenmaß) gesetzt.

inputs.label: Unit (0=deg,1=rad)
inputs.businessContext: Select unit: 0 for degrees, 1 for radians. The angle will be interpreted accordingly.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select unit: 0 for degrees, 1 for radians. The angle will be interpreted accordingly.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim seçin: 0 derece, 1 radyan. Açı buna göre yorumlanacaktır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Einheit: 0 für Grad, 1 für Bogenmaß. Der Winkel wird entsprechend interpretiert.

inputs.label: Amplitude
inputs.businessContext: Amplitude scaling factor for the cosine function. Default 1 gives standard cosine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amplitude scaling factor for the cosine function. Default 1 gives standard cosine.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kosinüs fonksiyonu için genlik ölçekleme faktörü. Varsayılan 1 standart kosinüs verir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Amplitudenskalierungsfaktor für die Kosinusfunktion. Standard 1 ergibt den normalen Kosinus.

inputs.label: Frequency Multiplier (b)
inputs.businessContext: Frequency multiplier for cosine argument: cos(b*x + phase).

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency multiplier for cosine argument: cos(b*x + phase).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kosinüs argümanı için frekans çarpanı: cos(b*x + faz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Frequenzmultiplikator für das Kosinusargument: cos(b*x + Phase).

inputs.label: Phase Shift (c)
inputs.businessContext: Phase shift added to argument. Input in radians regardless of unit selector, since phase shift is typically in radians.

businessContext_i18n.en: Phase shift added to argument. Input in radians regardless of unit selector, since phase shift is typically in radians.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Argümana eklenen faz kayması. Faz kayması tipik olarak radyan cinsinden olduğu için birim seçiciden bağımsız olarak radyan cinsinden girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Phasenverschiebung, die zum Argument addiert wird. Eingabe in Bogenmaß unabhängig vom Einheitenwähler, da die Phasenverschiebung typischerweise in Bogenmaß angegeben wird.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktının yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Rundung des Ergebnisses.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
